title: AuditGate Entry
description: Serialized output of auditgate.AuditEntry.to_dict(). Tamper-evident audit log entry. Field order in this schema is normative for hash computation.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Consumers must check this before parsing.

ts.description: Monotonic timestamp from engine clock. Used for ordering, not wall time.

wall_ts.description: Wall-clock timestamp as ISO 8601 UTC. Human-readable audit time.

verdict.description: Outcome of the gate decision being audited.

gate_identity.description: Identity string of the gate that produced the decision.

recorded_by.description: Identifier of the AuditGate engine instance that recorded this entry.

detail.description: Arbitrary metadata attached to this audit entry.

entry_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of canonical entry content. Null when integrity mode is NONE.

prev_hash.description: Hash of previous entry in chain. Null for first entry or non-CHAIN mode.

sequence.description: Monotonically increasing sequence number within this trail.
